name.zh: RFI 回环 HTTP Marker 包含边界
name.en: RFI Loopback HTTP Marker Inclusion Boundary

description.zh: 使用只返回纯文本 marker 的回环 HTTP 服务验证远程资源是否进入服务端 include/template Sink，不提供任何脚本内容。
description.en: Uses a loopback HTTP service returning plain-text markers only to test whether a remote resource reaches a server include or template sink without serving script content.

description.zh: 在已启动的回环 marker 服务上只请求该短文本资源，并把服务端首包与应用 include 调用栈关联。
description.en: Request only this short text resource from the loopback marker service and correlate the first packet with the application's include call stack.

description.zh: 记录运行时远程包含配置、Sink 和纯文本负对照。
description.en: Record runtime remote-inclusion settings, the sink, and a plain-text negative control.

description.zh: 只提交本执行区 URL 并触发一次处理。
description.en: Submit only this execution URL and trigger one processing run.

description.zh: 绑定 marker 首包、请求 ID、调用栈和渲染输出。
description.en: Bind the marker first packet, request ID, call stack, and render output.

description.zh: 修复后本地模板保持可用，远程 URL 在访问前被拒绝。
description.en: After remediation local templates remain functional and the remote URL is rejected before access.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求应用进程获取该 token 且 include/template Sink 消费响应；普通 HTTP 客户端请求、URL 回显或连接错误不算。
analysis.en: A positive requires the application process to fetch this token and the include or template sink to consume the response; an ordinary HTTP client request, URL reflection, or connection error does not count.

name.zh: RFI HTTP Scheme 大小写规范化边界

description.zh: 逐条比较混合大小写与大写 HTTP scheme 在校验器、URL parser 和远程包含 Sink 中是否被一致规范化。
description.en: Compares mixed-case and uppercase HTTP schemes one at a time to determine whether validators, URL parsers, and remote-inclusion sinks normalize them consistently.

description.zh: 每次只提交一行并记录校验值、parser 规范化结果和 marker 首包，避免把两次请求混为一个证据。
description.en: Submit one line per run and record the validated value, parser normalization result, and marker first packet without combining two requests into one finding.

description.zh: 记录小写 HTTP 在各层的规范化与远程包含结果。
description.en: Record lower-case HTTP normalization and remote-inclusion results across layers.

title.en: Submit case variants one by one

description.zh: 每轮只选择本执行区的一行。
description.en: Select only one line from this execution entry per run.

description.zh: 关联边界校验、URL parser、首包和 include 日志。
description.en: Correlate edge validation, URL parser output, first packets, and include logs.

description.zh: 修复后所有 scheme 先规范化再授权，远程 URL 一致拒绝。
description.en: After remediation every scheme is normalized before authorization and remote URLs are rejected consistently.

analysis.zh: 大小写 scheme 只有在校验层拒绝而 include 层规范化并访问同一 marker 时才证明差异；两个层都接受或都拒绝不是绕过。
analysis.en: A scheme-case difference is proven only when validation rejects while the include layer normalizes and fetches the same marker; both layers accepting or rejecting is not a bypass.

title.zh: 启动一次性回环 Marker 服务
title.en: Start a Disposable Loopback Marker Service

commands.command:
work_dir=$(mktemp -d)
printf '%s\n' 'PAYLOADER_MARKER' > "$work_dir/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
python3 -m http.server 18080 --bind 127.0.0.1 --directory "$work_dir" > "$work_dir/server.log" 2>&1 &
server_pid=$!
trap 'kill "$server_pid" 2>/dev/null; rm -rf "$work_dir"' EXIT
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 http://127.0.0.1:18080/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt

description.zh: 创建只含固定文本的临时目录，在 127.0.0.1:18080 启动短生命周期 HTTP 服务并用一次 curl 证明夹具可用。
description.en: Create a temporary directory containing fixed text only, start a short-lived HTTP service on 127.0.0.1:18080, and verify the fixture with one curl request.

description.zh: 保留纯文本与 Base64 marker 作为本地 data wrapper 兼容性夹具，不包含 PHP 标签、命令参数或脚本。
description.en: Retain plain-text and Base64 markers as local data-wrapper compatibility fixtures without PHP tags, command parameters, or scripts.

reason.zh: 原区块托管脚本并建立反向 Shell，具有直接命令执行和外连副作用，已替换为可审计退休标记。
reason.en: The original block hosted script code and created a reverse shell with direct command-execution and egress effects, so it is replaced by an auditable retirement marker.

reason.zh: 原“双写”字符串不能形成有效 HTTP URL，既不可复现也不能证明规范化差异。
reason.en: The original double-write strings do not form valid HTTP URLs and cannot reproducibly demonstrate a normalization difference.

reason.zh: 原区块混合 FTP 与远程 php filter，两者前提和解析链不同，不能作为同一 RFI 绕过步骤。
reason.en: The original block mixes FTP and a remote PHP filter with different prerequisites and resolver chains and cannot serve as one RFI bypass step.
